questions.prompt: Which of these can a Site manager do? (Select all that apply.)
choices: Discover and add printers on networks belonging to their managed sites
Add and remove groups for site-managed print queues
View History for site-managed printers and computers
questions.explanation: Site managers operate within their managed sites: printers, queues, groups for queues, history. They cannot touch tenant-wide Authentication, Subscription, or Settings (Settings is read-only with Analytics excluded).

questions.prompt: A Site manager can promote themselves to System manager when they need full access during an emergency.
questions.explanation: Role escalation is done by an existing System manager via User properties. Self-promotion isn't supported and shouldn't be.
